overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing the player character walking through a dimly lit neon bar or club with green and red lighting. The environment features industrial architecture with exposed pipes, poster-covered walls, and arcade machines.

round table with checkered pattern and bottles on top
simple wooden chair next to the table
industrial metal pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow corridor with industrial architecture, passing by a round table with bottles and a wooden chair. Green neon-lit windows line the right wall while posters including a red 'THE FIGHT BEGINS' poster cover the wall ahead. The environment is dimly lit with a cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lounge area with leather seating and neon signage

events.description: turns left from narrow corridor into open lounge area
character walks past the camera from background to foreground

agents.ego_description: turns left into the open lounge area and continues walking through the space

notable_agents.action: character in light clothing walks past the camera from the background toward the left side

entered.detail: black leather couch against the left wall
red neon heart-shaped sign on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider lounge area featuring a black leather couch on the left and a red neon heart sign visible in the background. A character walks past the camera from the background toward the left side. The lighting remains dark with mixed green and red neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with arcade machine and red-lit exit

events.description: begins following character in white clothing toward the red-lit doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the back corridor following a character toward the exit

entered.detail: yellow-trimmed arcade machine with glowing screen and scattered papers
exit doorway framed with bright red neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a character in white clothing through a back corridor toward a red-lit doorway. An arcade machine with yellow trim becomes prominent on the right side as the camera approaches the exit. The green neon windows remain visible in the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk interior that transitions from a narrow industrial corridor into a wider lounge and finally toward a red-lit exit. It begins by gliding past a round table with bottles and wooden chairs, moving alongside green neon-lit windows and walls plastered with posters. As the corridor opens into a spacious lounge, the camera passes a black leather couch and a red neon heart sign while a character crosses the path from the background. The scene then shifts back into a tighter rear corridor, following a character in white clothing toward a glowing red doorway. Finally, the camera brushes past a yellow-trimmed arcade machine on the right before reaching the exit, with the distant green neon windows fading into the background.
